designLanguageV2.note: Design Language V2 (Journey visual system) — a design initiative separate from the PRD atomic tasks below. Overlay-based and non-breaking: new .dl-v2-scoped styles-v2.css + motion-v2.js layer over the untouched styles.css/app.js base.

stages.A-overlay: done — app/styles-v2.css (.dl-v2-scoped tokens/card-tiers/motion) + app/motion-v2.js (guarded, idempotent journey-spine runtime) mounted after styles.css/app.js in client.html. Verified 0 regressions on legacy pages.
stages.B-journey-source: done — dead journey[] replaced by JOURNEY_STAGES (7 canonical stages) in app.js, exposed as window.JOURNEY_STAGES; New User Guide timeline converged onto it.
stages.C-home: done — renderDashboard rewritten to the dl-v2 film-rhythm (split hero / dark proof / journey spine / bento / dark real-data workspace / trust / coral CTA). Spine built from JOURNEY_STAGES by motion-v2. Verified 7 nodes + 7 detail cols, real counts() tiles, 0 uncaught exceptions.
stages.D-extend: done — guide/trust/community rebuilt in dl-v2 (guide reuses the animated spine). 6 transactional views (links/haul/orders/qc/shipping/wallet) reskinned via the .dl-v2.tx-v2 overlay with functional markup 100% preserved. Orphan assets retired: mascot, wordmark, logistics-hero, hero-background.
stages.E-cleanup: partial — dead .home-hero photo reference removed + hero-background.jpg retired. Full styles.css 223-hardcoded-hex → token migration remains gradual (it still styles the shell: sidebar/header/footer/auth).
stages.remaining: transactional forms verified only against empty demo data (no populated cards/tables/forms yet); auth/creator/account views not yet converted; full hex→token migration is gradual per the plan.

designLanguageV2.verification: Headless Chrome CDP screenshots (1440px + 390px, plus prefers-reduced-motion) per view; runtime probes confirm spine build and 0 uncaught exceptions across all 10 client renderers.

notes.V2-12-08: migration全量演练:migration-lint.js 破坏性守卫(drop table/column、truncate、delete from、drop schema 需 @destructive-approved 标记否则 blocked;drop constraint/trigger/index 属routine不拦);测试对全部迁移文件扫描无未审批破坏性语句(历史 000014 身份改造含 alter drop+delete 已加审批标记);migrate 运行器已有 checksum 漂移检测(变更即抛)+ migrate-dry-run.mjs 空库/重复执行演练;单测覆盖 lint pass/block。
notes.V2-12-09: 性能与并发基线:真实库并发回归 4 项——两包裹并发预留同一库存单恰好一个成功(唯一索引,一条 live 预留无脏写)、并发佣金冲正同一包裹恰好一笔提交(idempotency_key 唯一)、并发后账本恒平衡、用户维度列表只返本人(有界不全表);分页有界由各 repo LIMIT + ops-console.pageSize(默认20/仅50/100)保证,不一次加载全量。
notes.V2-12-10: 安全测试:security-baseline 5 项——①九角色越权(support 无 finance:wallet:write/config:write、warehouse 无 procurement/finance、campaign 无 warehouse,仅 super_admin 通配)+ 用户详情页签越权 403;②注入安全(恶意 email OR 1=1;DROP 作字面量参数化不崩不匹配);③私有文件签名必需+过期+异 key 不可重用(不可枚举);④secret/连接串不入日志/错误(redactLogFields+publicErrorMessage);高风险动作(审批/冲正/锁定)服务层角色守卫不可绕过。
notes.V2-12-11: 验收 E2E-01 淘宝代购正常:真实 order+procurement+wms+finance 服务图全链路——建单→支付分配→领取采购→确认购买→登记发货→到货扫码匹配→测量→QC 四图→正式入库,断言入库单号+官方入库时间+item fulfillment=warehoused。

notes.V2-12-13: 验收 E2E-03 部分缺货取消:多子订单母单,itemA 缺货 respondException(cancel)→cancelled,itemB 未受影响仍在推进(母单其他子订单继续)。
